items.name: Lev8
items.description: Find, research, and reach the right people. Chat with Lev8, the fastest way to find and reach your target people and companies, powered by live web search via parallel AI agents across every corner of the internet. Enrich CSVs with waterfall lookups, monitor intent signals, and send personalized multi-channel messages, all running automatically.

raw_data.tagline: Find, research, and reach the right people

items.name: CartAI
items.description: The AI agent that handles checkout.. Checkout is the hard part, and most solutions clear it only where the merchant has integrated. CartAI completes checkout on any live merchant surface with no merchant-side work, cooperating with bot detection instead of evading it. One developer-first API, four products: Catalog (search and live pricing across merchants), Checkouts (clear and track orders to confirmation), Payments (PCI off your stack via Visa and Mastercard agent rails), Monetization (commissions on every agent sale).

raw_data.tagline: The AI agent that handles checkout.

items.name: Routine AI
items.description: Control work with your voice. The Siri for work.. Routine AI lets you control your tasks, calendar, notes and projects using your voice. Just talk naturally to schedule meetings, add reminders, capture ideas, write notes, search your knowledge, update projects and automate repetitive work.

raw_data.tagline: Control work with your voice. The Siri for work.

items.name: Jockey by TwelveLabs
items.description: The video AI agent that understands your whole library. Jockey is the first AI that understands your entire media library just like you do, searching by person, moment, or context across every photo and video you've captured. Powered by TwelveLabs' advanced model stack, Jockey improves automatically with every update. Whether you need to connect via MCP for Claude/ChatGPT or build custom applications using our API, Jockey makes your media library instantly searchable and accessible.

raw_data.tagline: The video AI agent that understands your whole library

items.name: CreateOS Sandbox
items.description: Instant, hardware Isolated Sandboxes for AI agents. CreateOS Sandbox gives AI agent builders their own fast, secure, hardware isolated, sandbox in ~30ms (p90). We have suit of CLI, SDK, 50+ SDK real world examples, claude plugins, computeSDK integration, and more

raw_data.tagline: Instant, hardware Isolated Sandboxes for AI agents

items.name: Manifest
items.description: Turn any webpage into an action manifest for AI agents. Manifest turns any webpage into a structured JSON map of what an AI agent can click, fill, and submit. One API call, no fragile selectors. Every action comes with resolved CSS/role locators, plus a requires field that encodes dependencies between elements (e.g. "select a plan before this button is clickable"). That's context aria snapshots don't give you. Python SDK, LangChain support, and an MCP server included. Built for anyone shipping browser agents.

raw_data.tagline: Turn any webpage into an action manifest for AI agents

items.name: Bolna Agent Studio
items.description: Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes. Bolna's Agent Studio lets any business build and deploy a production-grade voice AI agent in minutes, no prompt engineering. Upload a doc or answer a few guided questions, and Studio assembles a call-ready agent from production-tested modules. Sign up and start calling on Day 0.

raw_data.tagline: Build Voice AI Agent in 10 Minutes

items.name: tterm
items.description: A terminal, a real browser, and Claude Code under one roof. tterm is a macOS cockpit for working with Claude Code. Every project is a row of explorer, Claude, and file viewer. Stack as many as you're juggling. A real Chromium browser lives inside, and there's no editor on purpose: you review diffs hunk by hunk and commit. It even rebuilds itself. Ask the Claude pane for a feature and the running app hot-reloads with it. No account, no telemetry. Free for hobbyists, on Apple silicon.

raw_data.tagline: A terminal, a real browser, and Claude Code under one roof

items.name: Universal Dictation on Stream
items.description: Private Voice Ring for dictation across iOS & Mac. Introducing Universal Dictation on Stream. Push-to-talk across iOS and Mac: Instantly. No app switching, no reconnection. We built Notes so nothing gets lost, and Chat so you can think out loud. With Dictation, your voice goes anywhere. Notes, Chat, Dictation—in one voice ring

raw_data.tagline: Private Voice Ring for dictation across iOS & Mac

items.name: Diffsmith
items.description: Comment on your AI agent's code & collaborate on changes. Diffsmith is a code review studio for local git changes made by Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, or any other AI coding agent. Open a repo, read the uncommitted diff, and click any line to leave a comment anchored to that exact spot. Then hand your notes straight back to the agent. Supports MCP for viewing you're agent's replies to your comments directly at the line of code it relates to. Diffsmith is 100% offline and a one time purchase unlocks lifetime access.

raw_data.tagline: Comment on your AI agent's code & collaborate on changes

items.name: Tidy
items.description: Your Mac tidies itself: screenshots, installers, Downloads. Tidy lives in your menu bar and handles three chores you keep doing by hand. It archives new Desktop screenshots, renaming them from their content with on-device OCR — "Screenshot 14.22.10.png" becomes "invoice-march.png". It ejects thedmg you mounted and trashes the installer. It sorts new Downloads by type, with rules you write in plain English. Apple Intelligence builds them on-device, so nothing leaves your Mac. Only touches new files. Never deletes. $9 once, no subscription.

raw_data.tagline: Your Mac tidies itself: screenshots, installers, Downloads

items.name: Hitoo
items.description: Speak all languages in your own voice, in real time. Hitoo translates conversations in real time — not just words, but tone, intent, and cultural context — while preserving your own voice across over 50+ languages.

raw_data.tagline: Speak all languages in your own voice, in real time

items.name: Mantlecore
items.description: Managed cloud for open-source AI agents. Managed cloud for open-source AI agents like Agent Zero and Hermes - deploy in one click, in under a second. Every agent runs in its own kernel-level isolated VM: no noisy neighbors. Automatic and manual snapshots make your agents unbreakable, so you can update and experiment fearlessly. Bring your own model provider via API key or OAuth. Skip the infra headache, come break things and we'll snapshot them for you!

raw_data.tagline: Managed cloud for open-source AI agents

items.name: BizDraft
items.description: Tailored business agreements in 90 seconds. BizDraft is an AI contract assistant for small business owners and freelancers. No generic templates to fine-tune with a lawyer — every document is tailored to your specific business, state laws included, in about 90 seconds. Draft agreements, get a plain-English read on contracts you receive, adjust terms, and catch risks before signing. It's entirely yours: free, fully editable, in whatever format you need.

raw_data.tagline: Tailored business agreements in 90 seconds

items.name: UpSolve
items.description: Post workflow problems. Get verified solutions.. UpSolve aims to accelerate innovation and problem-solving worldwide. For the first time ever, You can post your biggest problems (or upvote others) and watch them get solved in weeks. Builders start with an automatic, built-in waitlist of users hungry for a solution. Every post passes our Humanity Pledge. Builders keep ownership - we only share in success when we present a winning product. Post the problem. Get a solution.

raw_data.tagline: Post workflow problems. Get verified solutions.

items.name: Evertree
items.description: Preserve your family's stories with AI-guided conversations. Every family has stories worth preserving, but many disappear because we never think to ask. Evertree helps families capture memories through AI-guided conversations, organize family history, preserve photos and voices, and build a lasting legacy together. We'd love your feedback as we continue building.

raw_data.tagline: Preserve your family's stories with AI-guided conversations

items.name: Sited
items.description: Is your brand visible to AI?. Get a free AI Visibility infographic for your website. See how discoverable your brand is across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Upgrade to a comprehensive $50 audit featuring six specialist AI agents analysing your brand's discoverability, citations, technical signals, content quality, competitive position, and prioritised recommendations. Receive a clear score, actionable fixes, and a roadmap to improve AI search visibility.

raw_data.tagline: Is your brand visible to AI?

items.name: LeadGuide
items.description: Sales Copilot built for authentic relationships, not spam.. Most AI SDRs are built to blast thousands of cold emails. That's not sales. That's spam. LeadGuide is built for quality, not quantity. It finds qualified leads, researches prospects, builds sales briefs, recommends the best next step, and helps you write personalized outreach in your own voice. AI does the prep - you stay in control. Built for founders and small teams who want better conversations, not more spam.

raw_data.tagline: Sales Copilot built for authentic relationships, not spam.

items.name: MyPeople
items.description: Put a boss on your Claude Code and Codex agents . Running five AI coding agents means five terminals and copy-pasting context between them. MyPeople replaces that with one board and a persistent Boss agent: you give it the outcome, it writes the cards, assigns an owner, and reviews the work before it reaches you. The Terminal Graph shows every agent's live terminal wired to the card it owns. The HUD shows who is working and lets you attach to any of them from the browser. Claude Code, Codex and Grok run side by side, self-hosted in Docker.

raw_data.tagline: Put a boss on your Claude Code and Codex agents

items.name: Vellum
items.description: Self-hosted MCP server over a folder of markdown. A lightweight, self-hosted MCP server that turns a plain folder of markdown into memory your AI agent can read and write. One 24 MB container, no database, no embeddings, no lock-in. Your notes stay flat files you own in git, Obsidian, or any editor. 15 MCP tools, its own OAuth, conflict-safe writes. MIT.

raw_data.tagline: Self-hosted MCP server over a folder of markdown

items.name: AdRiseLab

items.name: Magical Chess
items.description: Free smart chess board — runs on the phone in your pocket.. Turn your phone into a smart chess board. Point the camera at any classical set. Magical Chess detects pieces in real time, tracks moves, runs the clock, and writes the notation for you automatically.

items.name: Feel: Weather Beyond Numbers
items.description: Weather that tells you how it actually feels.. The core idea is factoring in temperature, humidity, wind, UV, and pressure to give you feelings that captures what conditions actually feel like on your body. You can also pick a personality for how it talks to you: Feels Like, Outfit Check, Comedian, or Cozy. Each one genuinely changes the writing style and I'm working on a couple more. I've also added Scenes which is a feature to change the background to specific landscapes such as cities, 7 wonders and more.

raw_data.tagline: Weather that tells you how it actually feels.

items.name: Dreemart AI - Turn Your Dream Into Art

Why Dreemart? 🎨 40+ Iconic Artist Styles ✨ High-quality, printable outputs 🚀 3-step easy creation process Use your art for unique gifts, custom home decor, or visual dreaming journals.

items.name: handmux—Your coding agent, on your phone
